name: 99 Acquisition Group Inc. Warrant
summary: 99 Acquisition Group Inc. is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company is based in Great Neck, New York. Each warrant entitles the holder to purchase one share of Class A common stock at a price of $11.50 per share.
